overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game, walking through neon-lit city streets at night. The player character moves from open commercial streets through covered walkways and narrow passages, passing holographic advertisements and mixed traditional-futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera walking along a concrete sidewalk. Neon green lights illuminate storefronts on the left while futuristic vehicles pass on the right. A tall building with red accent lights dominates the skyline ahead as the player approaches a crosswalk.

segments.scene_description: The player moves along a covered commercial walkway, passing red paper lanterns and food stalls. The environment becomes more sheltered under awnings. A pedestrian in a yellow shirt walks ahead as the player approaches a cluster of vending machines on the right.

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds along a covered walkway lined with massive curved holographic billboards on the left and futuristic advertising pillars on the right. The space is empty of pedestrians, with glowing neon advertisements providing the primary illumination as the path curves gently.

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, enclosed passage with steep concrete stairs leading upward. High walls on both sides display large illuminated advertisements for PASSION. The lighting becomes darker and more artificial. A figure in red shorts walks ahead, leading the way up the stairs.

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow passage into a wide open plaza. A traditional red pagoda stands prominently on the right, contrasting with the surrounding modern buildings. Two people sit on a concrete bench near a planter on the left, while another figure walks ahead into the plaza. The space feels more open with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling neon-lit city street into a secluded urban plaza that blends futuristic and traditional architecture. It begins on a concrete sidewalk illuminated by green neon storefronts and red skyline accents, moving past futuristic vehicles toward a crosswalk. As the camera enters a sheltered commercial walkway, the open street gives way to a canopy of awnings, red paper lanterns, and food stalls. The scene then shifts into a more sterile, enclosed corridor dominated by massive curved holographic billboards and glowing advertising pillars before narrowing further into a dark passage with steep concrete stairs flanked by illuminated PASSION advertisements. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure into a wide open plaza, where the artificial glow of the city meets the traditional silhouette of a red pagoda.
